trending_videos.title: SPIDER-MAN: BRAND NEW DAY – New Trailer (4K)
trending_videos.description:
The world may have forgotten Peter Parker, but he hasn't forgotten them. 

Watch the new trailer for #SpiderManBrandNewDay, in theatres July 31. Tickets on sale NOW.

July 31, 2026

It's a BRAND NEW DAY for Peter Parker. Fighting crime full-time as Spider-Man in a world that doesn’t remember him—and the pressure of seeing his old friends move on without him—sparks a change in Peter he may not have the power to control. But that transformation might also be the only thing that can stop a shocking new threat to the city and those he loves - a powerful villain no one can even see.
The world may have forgotten Peter Parker, but he hasn’t forgotten them.

Directed by:   
Destin Daniel Cretton   
 
Written by: 
Chris McKenna & Erik Sommers and Justin Kuritzkes
   
Based on the MARVEL Comic Book by: 
Stan Lee and Steve Ditko

Produced by:      
Kevin Feige, p.g.a.
Amy Pascal, p.g.a.   
Avi Arad
Rachel O'Connor, p.g.a.

Executive Producers:    
Louis D'Esposito 
David Cain

Cast:  
Tom Holland

trending_videos.title: 🔴LIVE | ESCAPE FROM TARKOBUNGUS | w/ HutchMF & Gimmick | MECCHA CHOMEREON LATER | #BUNGULATE
Mario - Let Me Love You (Lyrics)
trending_videos.description:
Stream: N/A

Check out our Playlist:
https://open.spotify.com/playlist/1oJZ98sB3FbQAbrZkEbdtQ?si=_xvuL7hdQlu_oQySAWsv2A

Lyrics:

[Intro]
Mmmm, ah
Mmmm, yeah
Mmmm
Yeah, yeah, yeah
Mmmm, ah
Mmmm, yeah
Mmmm
Yeah, yeah

[Verse 1]
Baby, I just don't get it, do you enjoy being hurt?
I know you smelled the perfume, the make-up on his shirt
You don't believe his stories, you know that they're all lies
Bad as you are, you stick around and I just don't know why

[Pre-Chorus]
If I was ya' man, baby, you'd...
Never worry 'bout what I do
I'd be coming home, back to you, every night, doing you right
You're the type of woman who deserves good things
Fistful of diamonds, a hand full of rings
Baby, you're a star, I just wanna show you you are

[Chorus]
You should let me love you
Let me be the one to
Give you everything you want and need
Baby, good love and protection
Make me your selection
Show you the way love's supposed to be
Baby, you should let me love you, love you, love you
Love you
Yeah, listen
tags: You should let me love you
Let me be the one to give you everything you want and need

themes.name: Spider-Man
themes.description: Spider-Man related content appears in three video titles, indicating a high interest in superhero and comic book franchises.

themes.name: Entertainment & Gaming
themes.description: Includes Grand Theft Auto VI and Netflix's Outer Banks, suggesting strong interest in video game and streaming service content.

themes.name: Music
themes.description: Music and lyric videos, such as 'JUMP INA CROWD' and 'Let Me Love You', remain popular.

themes.name: Live Streaming
themes.description: The 'ESCAPE FROM TARKOBUNGUS' live stream indicates engagement with live content and community interaction.

superhero_and_comic_content.description: High engagement with Spider-Man content suggests continued demand for superhero-related videos. Collaborations with comic book creators or exclusive previews could capture this audience.
superhero_and_comic_content.potential_audience: Fans of Marvel, DC, and other superhero franchises.

gaming_content.description: Interest in 'Grand Theft Auto VI' and live gaming streams indicates a robust market for gaming content. Opportunities include exclusive game previews, live gameplay sessions, and collaborations with popular gamers.
gaming_content.potential_audience: Gamers and fans of action-adventure games.

music_and_cultural_content.description: Music videos and lyric content are consistently popular. Opportunities exist for new music releases, cultural music exploration, and interactive music experiences.
music_and_cultural_content.potential_audience: Music enthusiasts and cultural exploration audiences.

content_creation.suggestion: Develop a series of Spider-Man related content, including trailers, breakdowns, and interactive fan theories.
Organize live interactive sessions with popular gamers to attract gaming audiences.
content_creation.expected_outcome: Boost in viewership and community engagement.

collaboration_opportunities.suggestion: Partner with music artists and cultural influencers to produce diverse music content.
collaboration_opportunities.expected_outcome: Expanded reach in music and cultural segments.

collaboration_opportunities.suggestion: Collaborate with streaming services like Netflix for early access or exclusive content previews.
